curation_notes: Patch commit ca938740 fixes issue #766 by adding an empty-string check on the resolved path before assigning it to the files_ vector entry in CoreFile::parse_(). Only one source file was changed. The pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct: the segmentation fault occurs because a resolved path is used without verifying it is non-empty, causing a null pointer dereference. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — the other .tcc files in the core/ directory handle different ELF note types (auxiliary vectors, process status, process info) and do not perform file path resolution.
